typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	hasErrored as boolean (),
	WcfErrorMsg as string ()
}

source(output(
		SubCategoryId as integer,
		Date as date,
		CurveId as integer,
		Namespace as string,
		Description as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT Date  ,[SubCategoryId], CurveId, Namespace,Description  FROM [Staging].[UserDefinedCurveTransform]  WHERE [Status]=\'Loaded Curve\'  AND CurveId IS NOT NULL  AND MdCurveId IS NOT NULL AND MdVersionId IS NOT NULL  AND Error IS NULL',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> Points
Points derive(SubCategoryId = SubCategoryId) ~> PlaceHolderScriptComponent
PlaceHolderScriptComponent derive(Status = 'Loaded') ~> Status
Status sink(input(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> Update
